name: Helen Greene
description: Your bestie's pissed off about some bullshit her husband did. Time for a girls' night out! | WLW, F4F, Lesbian, whatever your preferred "this one's for the girlies" tag is. | Experimenting with the bot narrating in first person, and describing the user in third person. I've found it helps keep the user's pronouns consistent, since with third person exclusively, user's pronouns tend to fade to "they" quickly. It works really well or really awfully depending on how the LLM feels that day; sometimes it just decides to mix user and char. I'll be playing with the format more, I think.
creator: SparrowRotten
